name: Lakes
description_short: Lakes Federal Credit Union is a local Indiana credit union chartered in 1956, serving members in White, Carroll, Jasper, and Pulaski counties with savings, checking, loans, and mortgage services.
description_long:
Lakes Federal Credit Union was established in 1956 by employees of RCA (Radio Corporation of America) in Monticello, Indiana. Originally housed in the RCA building, the credit union relocated twice—first in 1982 when the RCA plant closed, and again in 2004 to its current location at 106 Rickey Road, which features an ATM and drive-thru lanes. The institution has gradually expanded its membership eligibility over decades, beginning with RCA employees and eventually opening to anyone living, working, worshiping, or attending school in White, Carroll, Jasper, or Pulaski counties.

Lakes FCU offers a comprehensive suite of retail banking products including checking and savings accounts, Christmas savings accounts, IRAs, certificates of deposit, and various loan products. The credit union has partnered with Member First Mortgage (MFM) to provide mortgage solutions for home purchases and refinancing. Members can access online banking through their home banking portal to check account activity and transfer funds between accounts, plus reorder checks online.

As a federally chartered credit union, Lakes FCU operates as a member-owned cooperative rather than a for-profit institution, which typically translates to competitive rates on loans and favorable dividend rates on deposits. The institution maintains limited but accessible branch hours (Monday-Thursday 9am-4:30pm, Friday 9am-6pm) and provides phone support at 1-877-295-0248. Their long operational history and local market presence suggest stability and community focus.

The primary limitation is geographic service area—membership is restricted to those with connections to specific Indiana counties, making this unsuitable for those outside the region. The institution appears to be a smaller, community-focused credit union without the extensive product offerings or technological sophistication of larger national competitors. Online banking appears functional but basic, and there is no mention of mobile app availability or advanced digital services.
pros: Member-owned credit union structure typically offers competitive loan rates and dividend rates compared to traditional banks
Established 68-year history demonstrates institutional stability and community commitment since 1956
Partnership with Member First Mortgage provides in-house mortgage lending support
Online home banking available for account monitoring and fund transfers
Multiple loan products available including personal, vehicle, and mortgage loans
Physical branch with drive-thru and ATM access in Monticello location
Expanded membership eligibility across four Indiana counties (not just employee-based)
cons: Geographic membership restriction limited to those living, working, worshiping, or attending school in White, Carroll, Jasper, or Pulaski counties
Limited branch hours (closes at 4:30pm most days) and single physical location
No evidence of mobile app or advanced digital banking capabilities mentioned on website
Smaller institution may lack product diversity and competitive features of larger regional/national credit unions
Limited online information about rates, fees, and specific loan terms
best_for: Residents and workers in White, Carroll, Jasper, or Pulaski counties seeking basic banking services
Individuals prioritizing community-focused, member-owned financial institutions
Members needing mortgage services through their established MFM partnership
Those seeking competitive rates on auto loans and personal loans within the service area
diagnosis: Lakes Federal Credit Union is best for individuals within its four-county Indiana service area seeking straightforward retail banking and competitive loan rates from a stable, community-focused financial institution. The primary caveat is strict geographic membership limitations—this institution is not accessible to those outside the specified White, Carroll, Jasper, and Pulaski counties.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: Lakes — Credit Union in Monticello, IN | CreditDoc
meta_description: Lakes — NCUA-insured credit union in Monticello, IN. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
